calendar_id.description: Single Google Calendar id. Omit to use primary unless calendar_ids or include_all_calendars is provided.

include_all_calendars.description: When true, discover available calendars and merge matching events.

window.description: Named agenda window. Defaults to today.

time_zone.description: Fixed offset such as UTC or +03:00. Defaults to UTC.

time_min.description: RFC3339 lower bound. Overrides window start when provided with time_max.

time_max.description: RFC3339 upper bound. Overrides window end when provided with time_min.

max_results.description: Maximum agenda events after merging. Defaults to 10 and is capped at 100.

max_events.description: Alias for max_results when calling this daily brief capability.

query.description: Google Calendar text search for title, attendee, location, description, or keyword.

description_chars.description: Maximum description preview characters per event. Defaults to 500.

email_query.description: Gmail search query for attention items. Defaults to unread messages from the last 7 days.

email_max_results.description: Maximum compact email summaries. Defaults to 5 and is capped at 20.

body_preview_chars.description: Maximum email snippet/body preview characters per message. Defaults to 500.
